people.draft:
Hi Laure,

We worked together on nine hires at Mirakl between 2020 and January 2025, then lost touch.

I see two Directors of Engineering in place now and an org that's shifted since. If you have open tech roles right now, I can send you profiles within five days, same mechanics as before: you only pay if you hire.

Is this relevant on your side at the moment?

Mathieu
